events.name: alien_signal
events.description: Strange crystalline structures found in deep drill core.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Unknown pathogen spreads through the water system.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Electronics damaged by electromagnetic pulse from solar event.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Drift Sand dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Willow Rift notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
